creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Oleg Sidorkin from comment #0)

I had an issue running multiple tunnels of it; can you try to modify this script to get us multiple tunnels setup? - as most of the people I know (including myself) run autossh in a separated shell script calling multiple tunnels.

Also, as the remote host is able to run SSH in a different port, adding '_remote_port' should be fine though too. Right?

What would you think about changing the 'autossh_host' to 'autossh_remote_host' and add 'autossh_remote_user'?

KR,
